description_long: This is a large, open-topped wooden crate with a weathered, grayish finish, constructed from vertical wooden planks. The crate features diagonal and crossed wooden braces on its sides for added structural support, giving it a classic, rustic appearance. One side of the crate has a detached wooden lid leaning against it, indicating that the crate can be covered or left open. The wood grain and texture are clearly visible, suggesting a rough, unfinished surface. The interior is hollow, making it suitable for storing or transporting various items. The overall build and size suggest it could be used in urban environments for storage, shipping, or as a decorative element.
description: A large, weathered wooden crate with a removable lid and visible diagonal bracing, featuring a rough, rustic texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open crate with a single diagonal wooden brace and visible interior.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid removed and leaning against the crate, exposing the open top and interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying crossed diagonal braces forming an 'X' pattern on the crate's side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid leaning outward, showing the open crate and single diagonal brace.
